overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character walking along the ancient waterfront promenade of Alexandria. The character approaches and passes through a large triumphal arch with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible across the water, encountering horse riders and transitioning from stone pavement to a dirt path lined with vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone promenade approaching triumphal arch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone promenade toward the large triumphal arch with the lighthouse visible in the distance

entered.detail: large stone archway with decorative columns and planters on top
tall white stone tower with smoke rising from the top, situated on the waterfront
white marble statue of a draped figure on a pedestal along the balustrade
low stone wall running along the right side bordering the water
large terracotta urn with decorative patterns placed against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit stone promenade with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible across the water to the right. A large triumphal arch looms ahead while marble statues and decorative urns line the path. The stone pavement is cracked with patches of grass, and the scene is devoid of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing through triumphal arch with palm-lined waterfront

events.description: character walks underneath the large stone triumphal archway
horse riders appear on the left side and pass by the character

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the archway as horse riders pass by on the left side of the path

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse along the path toward the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees with green and brown fronds lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes underneath the triumphal arch as the scene opens up to reveal palm trees lining the waterfront path. Horse riders pass by on the left while the Lighthouse of Alexandria remains visible across the water. The stone balustrade continues along the right side as the path curves slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail along waterfront with dense vegetation

events.description: ground surface transitions from stone pavement to dirt trail with surrounding vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path surrounded by dense trees and bushes with the lighthouse still visible ahead

entered.detail: white marble statue on a pedestal visible ahead on the path
thick bushes and leafy trees surrounding the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to dirt as the character moves through a more natural environment with dense vegetation and trees lining the route. The stone balustrade fades from view while the Lighthouse of Alexandria remains visible in the distance to the right. The character approaches another marble statue as the surroundings become increasingly lush and green.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit waterfront promenade that transforms from a formal stone walkway into a lush, natural path. It begins with the character walking past marble statues and decorative urns on a cracked stone pavement, with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible across the water to the right. As the camera passes underneath a looming triumphal arch, the scene opens up to reveal palm trees and horse riders passing by on the left. The environment then shifts as the stone balustrade fades from view and the pavement transitions into a dirt path. Finally, the surroundings become increasingly green and dense with vegetation, moving toward another marble statue while the distant lighthouse remains a constant landmark on the horizon.
